description: A fully frontend-only SaaS tool aggregator with a cyberpunk neon glassmorphism design. No backend — all data stored in localStorage. Built with React + Vite + TypeScript.

tech_stack.routing: wouter v3 (use href not to in Redirect; use useLocation() navigate)
tech_stack.styling: Tailwind CSS v4 + custom CSS variables (no tw-animate-css)

design_system.glass_panel: background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); backdrop-filter: blur(20px)
design_system.gradient_text: background: linear-gradient(to right, hsl(180 100% 50%), hsl(280 100% 65%)); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent
design_system.background_glows: Fixed radial gradient blobs (cyan top-left, purple top-right, pink bottom-center) at low opacity for ambient depth

types.User: { id, username, email, mobile, password?, role: Role, subscription: Plan, profilePhoto?, createdAt }
types.Tool: { id, name, description, icon, url, category, isPremium: boolean, isActive: boolean, createdAt }

mock_api.description: All API functions use localStorage with a 400ms simulated delay. getCurrentUser has NO delay (reads synchronously). Exported as api.{method}.
methods: getCurrentUser(): Promise<User | null> — reads etoolspot_currentUser directly, no delay
login({ email, password?, isGoogle? }): Promise<User> — validates credentials or creates Google mock user
signup(data: Partial<User>): Promise<User> — creates new USER role with FREE plan
updateUser(id, updates): Promise<User> — also updates etoolspot_currentUser if same id

auth_hooks.description: TanStack Query hooks wrapping mock-api. useCurrentUser uses initialData to read from localStorage synchronously on first render — prevents blank screen flash.
hooks: useCurrentUser() — queryKey: ['currentUser'], initialData: reads etoolspot_currentUser from localStorage, staleTime: Infinity
useLogin() — mutation, onSuccess sets queryClient data
useSignup() — mutation, onSuccess sets queryClient data
useLogout() — mutation, onSuccess nulls currentUser and clears queryClient

routing.auth_gate: AuthGate component reads useCurrentUser(). If no user, renders <Login /> directly (no redirect) — avoids URL flash. Wraps all protected routes.

landing.navbar_behavior: If user is logged in: show avatar initial + username + dashboard icon button (navigates to /dashboard). If not logged in: show Login + Get Started buttons.
landing.hero: Full-screen with animated badge, large uppercase heading with gradient text, subtext, two CTA buttons, stats row (5+ Tools, 10K+ Users, Free to Start)
landing.tools_grid: 5 tool cards with lucide icons, hover glow effect
landing.pricing: 3 cards — Free ($0), Pro ($9.99/mo, highlighted with Most Popular badge), Premium ($19.99/mo)
landing.animations: framer-motion staggerChildren on scroll (whileInView), hero animates on mount

dashboard.content: Welcome greeting with username, subscription badge, tool cards grid, quick stats (total tools, active tools, premium tools), recent activity section

tools.content: Searchable/filterable grid of all tools. Filter by category and premium/free. Each card shows icon, name, description, badge (FREE/PRO), and a launch button (disabled if tool isPremium and user is FREE plan).

settings.content: Edit profile (username, email, mobile, profile photo), change password, theme customization (primaryColor, secondaryColor CSS variables applied live to document.documentElement)

admin.access: Only visible in sidebar for ADMIN role users
admin.content: User management table (view all users, change role/plan), Tool management (add/edit/delete tools with form modal), Site settings (siteName, colors)

subscription.content: Current plan display, upgrade cards for Pro and Premium plans with feature lists, upgrade button (updates user subscription in localStorage)

sidebar.mobile: Hidden by default, toggled by hamburger menu with overlay backdrop
items: Home (/) — House icon — navigates to landing page
sidebar.bottom: User avatar (first letter), username, subscription plan label, Logout button

layout.top_header: Desktop only — Bell icon with animated pulse dot, ONLINE status badge

global_settings.description: On app mount, reads etoolspot_settings from localStorage and applies primaryColor and secondaryColor to CSS variables (--primary, --secondary) on document.documentElement to prevent flicker.

implementation_notes: Use initialData in useCurrentUser to read localStorage synchronously — prevents the blank screen or login flash on protected pages
AuthGate renders <Login /> inline when unauthenticated, does NOT redirect — keeps URL stable and avoids flash
CSS: put @import url(Google Fonts) FIRST, then @import 'tailwindcss' — Tailwind v4 breaks if font import is after
Wouter v3: use href (not to) in Link/NavLink components
WouterRouter base must strip trailing slash from BASE_URL
All protected page redirects after login/signup go to /dashboard, not /
Sidebar Dashboard NavLink href is /dashboard not /
Settings color changes apply CSS variables live on document.documentElement so the UI updates in real time without reload
simulateDelay (400ms) is used for all write operations to mimic network latency, but NOT on getCurrentUser for instant auth check
Admin seed is only created if etoolspot_users array is empty — prevents duplicating on reload
